entry.title: 4 Teams That Could Shape The MLB Trade Deadline
entry.summary:
Who should buy, who should sell, and who should stand pat at the MLB Trade Deadline? Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz play a game of "Wheeling and Dealing," breaking down the Mets, Blue Jays, Padres and Tigers while debating the biggest decisions each team faces before the deadline. Plus, the crew discusses potential trade targets, whether Tarik Skubal should be moved, and what could shape the market over the next two weeks.

entry.title: We Investigated (and Interviewed) Epstein's Billionaire Funder | PTFO
entry.summary:
Victoria's Secret mogul turned mega-donor Leslie Wexner introduced Jeffrey Epstein to Harvard. Now, a growing protest movement to strip his name from university buildings is getting shut down. What did Epstein's money man know? When did he know it? And who really calls the shots in higher education? The Harvard Crimson's Dhruv Patel returns for Part 3 in our series on America's most prestigious school and most notorious predator, to examine Wexner and Epstein's "friendship," plus an exclusive interview and a new tranche of internal fundraising transactions that reveals $100 million in publicly unaccounted donations.
• Part 1: WTF Is the Epstein Fund for Women's Sports? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1JclWYNwHQ
• Part 2: New Files Reveal How Epstein Paid Harvard to Launder His Image https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lmOHrXq2jpM
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and The Harvard Crimson and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

entry.title: XPeng L03 DRIVEN: Has China SOLVED The Model Y?!
entry.summary:
The XPeng L03 is a $21,000 electric crossover with Model Y-rivalling space, advanced technology, and XPeng’s VLA 2.0 driving system. It costs around $18,000 less than the cheapest Tesla Model Y in China, and it is coming to Europe and other global markets.
XPeng L03 First Look: https://youtu.be/t9Oj4YOhW8A
In this video, I test the XPeng L03 on the road and examine its price, range, charging, interior, practicality, suspension, export specifications, and VLA 2.0 technology. With European pricing yet to be announced, could this half-price Model Y rival expose just how expensive mainstream EVs have become?
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
____________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:
- XPeng L03 starts from $18,000 less than Tesla Model Y in China - Uses 2 XPeng Turing AI Chips 1500 TOPs - XPeng VLA 2.0 ADAS (FSD Beta Rival) - Coming to Australia, Europe and 63 countries - XPeng VLA 2.0 coming to Europe in 2027 ____________________________________________________________
⏱️ Video Chapters:
0:00 - Intro 0:17 - Check Out the First Look?
0:39 - XPeng L03 Price
1:05 - Exterior 1:20 - Frunk and Trunk Space
1:56 - Interior (Rear) 2:37 - Interior (Front)
4:18 - Charging Speed 4:44 - Battery and Range
5:14 - Driving Impressions 7:03 - XPeng VLA 2.0 8:56 - VLA 2.0 Coming to Europe
10:01 - Conclusion ____________________________________________________________
📍 Shot in Beijing, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs

entry.title: Decoding the Kawhi Leonard Investigation, with DeMaurice Smith | PTFO
entry.summary:
A superstar held up by the salary cap. A billionaire under the microscope. A league inquiry hidden from public view. De Smith has seen this playbook for punishment before. The former NFL union boss — and white-shoe law-firm investigator — returns to answer questions the NBA still won't: Who is "independent" when the league (and Steve Ballmer, in particular) pays the legal bill? Why would witnesses participate if they face potential criminal exposure? How do unions play the long game? And what obligation does a league have to its fans, if cheating can be the baseline?
• Read "Turf Wars" by DeMaurice Smith: https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/735685/turf-wars-by-demaurice-smith/
• Binge-watch Pablo's Kawhi Leonard investigation: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLp43H6Vt_yDoUarxNb_fVK9_6bSiA2aHo
• Previously on PTFO — Digging Up NFL Collusion Dirt with Ex-Union Boss DeMaurice Smith: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=db4DXqq5iPY
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

Why would witnesses participate if they face potential criminal exposure? How do unions play the long game? And what obligation does a league have to its fans, if cheating can be the baseline?

entry.title: BREAKING: Reds Lock Up Chase Burns Long-Term
entry.summary:
Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Scott Braun break down Chase Burns' seven-year extension with the Reds and what it means for both sides. We discuss why more young pitchers are choosing long-term security over free agency, how Cincinnati has built one of baseball's best young rotations, and why the organization's investment in pitching development is paying off. Plus, we explain why this deal could become a blueprint for small-market teams moving forward.

entry.title: How Microtransactions (Almost) Ruined Gaming, with Dan Soder | PTFO
entry.summary:
Virtual currency is a new cheat code. But when EA Sports tried to squeeze extra cash out of college-football fans with so-called "microtransactions" inside the new CFB 27, gamers revolted... and won? Comedian Dan Soder, who's been playing video games with a future NFL coach since childhood, takes Pablo Torre on a journey to the seventh circle of nerddom: What does this phenomenon say about private equity turning fun into an asset? How do we stop sacrificing community for convenience? And is shame still possible?
• Subscribe to Dan Soder on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@DanSoder
Previously on PTFO:
• What It's Like to Play Madden Against an NFL Head Coach: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Drnz-oS6RIU
• We Smoked All the Athlete-Branded Weed We Could Find: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fZcahaB3hYI

entry.title: Ken Rosenthal On How MLB's Crowded Playoff Race Will Impact The Trade Deadline
entry.summary:
FT Senior Insider Ken Rosenthal breaks down how MLB's crowded playoff races could completely reshape this year's trade deadline. With 23 of 30 teams still within four games of a playoff spot entering the All-Star break, Ken explains why buyers and sellers are harder to identify than ever. Plus, he discusses what the Tigers should do with Tarik Skubal, why the Red Sox have changed the conversation, and how teams like the Astros, Blue Jays, Orioles, Diamondbacks and Padres could approach one of the most unpredictable deadlines in recent memory.

entry.title: This NIO ES8 Has Fewer Seats And More EVERYTHING!
entry.summary:
The NIO ES8 5-seater takes NIO’s luxury electric SUV and makes it more spacious, more practical, and arguably more interesting. By removing the third row, NIO has created huge rear-seat space, a massive boot, and a five-seat version that feels like more than just a seat option.
NIO ES8 full Review: https://youtu.be/RNIcmEhxSgY
In this video, I look at what makes the NIO ES8 five-seat version different from the six-seat and seven-seat models, including the rear-seat layout, luxury features, cargo space, fridge, massage seats, and the latest NIO World Model ADAS update.

* NIO ES8 five-seat luxury electric SUV * Same 5.28m body as the six-seat and seven-seat ES8 * Huge second-row legroom with reclining rear bench * HUGE Trunk space * Latest NIO World Model ADAS update

entry.title: Anthony Volpe Shuts Down False Report From Michael Kay
entry.summary:
Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Alanna Rizzo react to Anthony Volpe shutting down a report that claimed he refused to play second base in the minors after Michael Kay publicly retracted the story. The trio discusses why a player's reputation matters, the responsibility that comes with anonymous sourcing, and why Volpe's response says a lot about the kind of teammate he is. Plus, they debate Don Mattingly's future with the Phillies and whether a deep postseason run should earn him the full-time manager's job.

entry.title: Why Dylan Cease Has Been Worth Every Penny For Toronto
entry.summary:
Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Alanna Rizzo react to Dylan Cease falling just three outs shy of a no-hitter and debate whether the Blue Jays made the right decision letting him chase history. Erik, Kevin and Alanna discuss why Cease's durability, dominant stuff and the timing of the season made the decision an easy one, where he stands in the American League Cy Young race, and why Toronto's early investment in the right-hander is paying off. Plus, they examine how postseason workloads can influence managers' decisions when pitchers have a chance to make history.

entry.title: The Home Run Derby Selection Process Needs To Change
entry.summary:
A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun debate whether MLB should allow non-All-Stars to compete in the Home Run Derby after Jac Caglianone received an invitation. FT Resident GM Jim Bowden weighs in on the controversy, and Rockies All-Star catcher Hunter Goodman reveals he still hasn't been invited despite saying he'd gladly participate. The guys discuss what the Derby should represent, why so many stars continue to pass on the event, and whether MLB needs to rethink its selection process.

entry.title: Shohei Ohtani Is Building A One-Of-A-Kind Legacy
entry.summary: A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun react to Shohei Ohtani becoming the first Japanese-born player to reach 300 career home runs and discuss what the latest milestone means for his incredible legacy. The guys explain why Ohtani's combination of elite power and pitching makes his accomplishments unlike anything baseball has ever seen, debate whether he has a realistic shot at winning both MVP and Cy Young this season, and look ahead to whether 500 home runs is within reach. Plus, they compare Ohtani's long-term outlook to other sluggers and discuss how his career could evolve once he's done pitching.

entry.title: Jim Bowden Maps Out The MLB Trade Deadline For Every Team
entry.summary:

Plus, Jim sounds off on Zack Wheeler's All-Star snub, Bryce Harper's Legends selection, and why MLB needs to rethink the current All-Star selection process.

entry.title: A.J. Pierzynski & Erik Kratz React To Justin Verlander's Retirement
entry.summary:
A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun react to Justin Verlander's announcement that he'll retire following the 2026 season. A.J. and Erik share stories from competing against Verlander throughout their careers, explain how he transformed the modern power pitcher, and break down the adjustments that allowed him to reinvent himself multiple times, from his MVP season in Detroit to his Cy Young comeback after Tommy John surgery. Plus, the guys reflect on Verlander's legendary preparation, remarkable longevity, and why he's an unquestioned first-ballot Hall of Famer.

entry.title: Debating The Marlins Decision To Pull Eury Pérez During A Perfect Game Bid
entry.summary:
A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun react to the Miami Marlins pulling Eury Pérez after seven perfect innings and just 92 pitches against the Reds. Was it the right long-term decision, or did the Marlins take away a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to complete a perfect game? The guys debate modern pitching limits, player development, and why A.J. believes moments like this are simply too special to let slip away.

entry.title: MLB's Baseball Mystery Just Got Bigger

entry.title: Uncovering Phil Mickelson's Misconduct Allegations | PTFO
entry.summary:
After months of rumors, journalist Alan Shipnuck investigates why Phil Mickelson has basically vanished from the LIV Golf Tour — and social media. Leading us down a rabbit hole of hidden misconduct claims and exits from three different golf clubs. Not to mention 19 sources, an off-shore oil pipeline and an ex-friend's ex-wife: Ashley Perez.

entry.title: Xpeng L03: European Carmakers Will Panic Over This Chinese EV
entry.summary:
The Xpeng Mona L3 is coming for the European EV market. See why mainstream manufacturers are worried about this new competitor.
European car brands like VW and Audi are facing serious competition as premium Chinese EVs enter their home territory. The Xpeng Mona L3 represents a new strategy, bringing advanced, premium tech into the entry-level EV segment. This shift creates a direct challenge for established mainstream OEMs that have previously dominated the region.
In this video, we take a quick first look at the XPeng L03 entry-level EV and break down how XPeng is trying to bring premium-level tech into the mainstream EV segment. This car is clearly aimed at both China and global markets, including Europe.
The bigger picture here is what this car represents. Chinese EV brands are no longer just challenging European luxury cars, they are now targeting the mainstream market where brands like Ford, Nissan, and Renault operate.
Disclaimer: The vehicle shown in the video is the Chinese-spec model filmed in China. Models and configurations for other markets shall be subject to actual vehicles available locally.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
- Entry-level EV with premium-level technology stack - 3 in-house developed self-driving chips (~2250 TOPS compute) - 800V architecture with fast charging capability - EV and EREV variants with up to 1000km+ combined range
____________________________________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:
0:00 - Intro 0:37 - A bit of Xpeng L03 context? 1:14 - Xpeng L03 Styling 1:39 - Xpeng L03 Tech 2:39 - AI Chassis
3:41 - Xpeng L03 Interior (Front) 5:16 - Xpeng L03 Interior (Rear)
6:07 - Charging, Range, Powertrain
7:13 - Outro
____________________________________________________________ 📍 Shot in Beijing, China 🎥 Subscribe for more in-depth reviews of the latest Chinese EVs

entry.title: The Sporting Class: Not Even FIFA Can Mess This Up | PTFO
entry.summary:
Ex-ESPN president John Skipper was once the most important soccer fan in America. But then he lost the World Cup to FOX — and became a federal witness. So we wanted to know what it’s been like to watch America fall in love with the very tournament Skipper wasn’t allowed to win. And whether federal corruption trials, nine figures worth of commercials and a Trump Tower apartment full of cats can slow the spread of the world’s favorite game.
• Donate to the Kyra Fund, which will support research on Glioblastoma, one of the deadliest cancers: https://fundraise.gbmresearch.org/campaign/812889/donate

entry.title: The Yankees Are Spiraling & Aaron Judge Has Seen Enough

Scott Braun, Erik Kratz and Ross Stripling react to Aaron Judge's rare public criticism of the Yankees during their seven-game losing streak and explain why the captain's message carries so much weight inside the clubhouse. The guys discuss what Judge meant by the team's "lack of focus," why leadership matters during difficult stretches, and whether New York has bigger issues than just sloppy play. Plus, Ross shares what it's like when respected veterans like Judge and Clayton Kershaw speak up, and why those moments can change the course of a season.

entry.summary:

entry.title: “Please Enjoy It Or You Are Fired” (feat. Dan Le Batard) | PTFO
entry.summary:
PTFO keeps winning awards. But what do we do for an encore? How do you make something special without losing our standards — or our minds? Do you guys even enjoy this? Pablo visits Miami to see his friend/boss, Dan Le Batard, and Dan’s producer, Chris Cote. They discuss balancing real life; perspective in the face of grief; Oprah; and figuring out how to serve an audience without missing the point.
• Donate to the Kyra Fund, which will support research on Glioblastoma, one of the deadliest cancers: https://fundraise.gbmresearch.org/campaign/812889/donate

Plus, they react to stories involving Kevin Gausman, Framber Valdez and Bryce Harper, and discuss why social media doesn't always reflect how fans truly feel.

entry.title: Willson Contreras' Helmet Tap Led To An Automatic Ejection?!
entry.summary:
Scott Braun, Jason Kipnis and Erik Kratz react to Willson Contreras' controversial ejection and debate whether MLB umpires have become too quick to throw players out of games. The guys discuss why the helmet tap shouldn't have resulted in an automatic ejection, whether umpires need thicker skin, and if MLB should rethink the rule moving forward. Plus, they break down Contreras' emotional postgame comments, the impact ejections like this have on the game, and why players, not umpires, should be the focus of baseball.

entry.title: Former Mets Hitting Coach Eric Chavez Sounds Off On David Stearns' Mets
entry.summary:
Former Mets hitting coach Eric Chavez joins Foul Territory to explain why he believes Carlos Mendoza shouldn't have been blamed for New York's disappointing season. Chavez discusses David Stearns' roster construction, why managers and coaches are taking the fall for front office decisions, and why he believes the game has leaned too heavily on analytics at the expense of experienced baseball people. Plus, he shares what really happened behind the scenes with Juan Soto, explains why the Mets should become sellers at the trade deadline, and offers his perspective on the future of the organization.

entry.title: We Remember the World Cup's Missing Muckraker | PTFO
entry.summary:
He covered soccer before it was cool, promised to go WikiLeaks on FIFA, then got detained and mysteriously collapsed in Qatar. If there was ever someone we needed to hear from, as a global conduit during this corrupt World Cup on American soil, it's Grant Wahl. So his former co-host, Chris Wittyngham — along with his widow and one of the many stars he inspired — helps Pablo Torre listen back to Wahl's lost tapes, re-live his fearless run for office and the rainbow target on his chest… then put the conspiracies to rest.
Previously on PTFO:
• John Green & Daniel Alarcón on World Cup Fandom — and the Worst Messi Interview Ever https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BFgJm0aUhgk
• Tim Weah on World Cup Dreams, the African Diaspora and USMNT's Fair-Weather Knicks Fandom https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_B0SbKYbiKw
• Following the Wasted Money at World Cup 2026 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9J8fYQhfjE0
Plus:
• Watch Chris Wittyngham on CBS Sports Golazo https://www.youtube.com/@cbssportsgolazo
• Subscribe to The Athletic https://theathletic.onelink.me/eNRy/ptfo

entry.title: John Green & Daniel Alarcón on World Cup Fandom — and the Worst Messi Interview Ever | PTFO
entry.summary:
We are numb, as Americans, to the attention of the globe and the power structures of our sports leagues. But what if love of country could be simple again? And what if fans had more power than we thought? Pablo Torre feels the football osmosis from the (banned) bestselling author and his old friend turned MacArthur Genius, as they offer a liberal-arts education in the beautiful game — from the fault in our superstar interviews to the damage wrought by Alexi Lalas upon our would-be Neymars and Messis. Plus: a pump-up speech that Ted Lasso would never, ever fantasize about.
• Subscribe to "The Away End with Daniel Alarcón and John Green": https://www.youtube.com/@AwayEndPodcast
• Previously on PTFO: John Green on the Fault in Our Health Care — and AFC Wimbledon's Fairytale https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qHiKbkWnjgo
• Subscribe to The Athletic: https://theathletic.onelink.me/eNRy/ptfo

entry.title: Tim Weah on World Cup Dreams, the African Diaspora and USMNT's Fair-Weather Knicks Fandom | PTFO
entry.summary:
Timothy Weah is the realest member of Team USA — an activist athlete, from Brooklyn and the African diaspora, choosing to represent a divisive nation as it tries bringing the globe a little closer together. In a rare sit-down ahead of the U.S. men's national team match against Australia, he explains the pressure of this moment, the power of soccer over politics... and why the Knicks' good-luck charm might need to strike again.

entry.content:
The UFC's White House fight card is straight out of central casting — and chock-full of political favor-trading. Who stands to gain the most? Luke Thomas unapologetically explains why everyone, from MMA fans to D.C. pundits, is missing the real story... then unearths fresh evidence of a purely transactional relationship.

entry.title: Following the Wasted Money at World Cup 2026 | PTFO
entry.summary:
The 2026 World Cup is underway, and FIFA stands to profit nearly $9 billion. How did U.S. taxpayers get stuck with the tab? The Athletic's Adam Crafton crunches the numbers on wasted public money, as Pablo Torre dissects comically absurd demands upon host cities — from "clean" stadiums and super-V.I.P. treatment... to a pop-up jail.
• Take the PTFO audience survey: https://forms.gle/i2K6FecAbvBqDxRK9
• Subscribe to The Athletic: https://theathletic.onelink.me/eNRy/ptfo
Further reading:
• "The U.S. signed up for the 2026 FIFA World Cup — and its 11 host cities are paying for it" https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/article/7314190/
• "U.S. states waived taxes to host World Cup" https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7321482/2026/06/10/world-cup-tax-waived-games/
• "The $25.8m Kansas City 'World Cup jail'" https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7309921/2026/06/09/world-cup-argentina-kansas-city-jail/
• Rahm Emanuel Q&A: 'The numbers don't work'" https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7318897/2026/06/08/world-cup-chicago-mayor-rahm-emanuel-2026/

entry.title: Jeremy Lin Opens Up on Knicks 2026 Finals Run & the Shadow of Linsanity
entry.summary:
Madison Square Garden hasn't felt this alive since a little-known point guard from Harvard became the most popular person in New York City. On the occasion of his grand return, Jeremy Lin sits down with Pablo Torre, who's been covering him since their dorm-room days, for a full-circle conversation about pressure, toughness, fleeting fame, the end of his run with the Knicks, squashing the beef with Carmelo Anthony and, yes, getting recruited by Kim Kardashian.
• Take the PTFO audience survey: https://forms.gle/i2K6FecAbvBqDxRK9
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter: https://www.pablo.show/

entry.title: "This Is Mind-Blowing": Steve Ballmer's Aspiration I.O.U., Uncovered | PTFO
entry.summary:
As Adam Silver calls for the NBA's Kawhi Leonard probe to wrap up and Aspiration co-founder Joe Sanberg gets 14 years behind bars, Pablo Torre investigates how Clippers owner Steve Ballmer covered his tracks on a side deal of his own — and with the SEC on the case. Former DOJ prosecutor Lou Manzo returns to make sense of the relationship between a billionaire and a fraudster, while David Samson is finally convinced that the richest owner in sports has lost credibility.
(Additional reporting by Anita Bennett)
• Take the PTFO audience survey: https://forms.gle/i2K6FecAbvBqDxRK9

entry.title: Hot on the Trail of Jeffrey Epstein with Reporter Julie K. Brown | PTFO
entry.summary:
Julie K. Brown went from working in a bell factory to ringing the alarm on masters of the universe and (finally) winning a Pulitzer Prize. The Miami Herald investigative reporter visits Pablo Torre to shed light on the culture of silence that protected Jeffrey Epstein for so long, the legal dream team that struck his secret deal, then how Epstein pulled out all the stops... to stop her reporting. Plus: the whistleblower who gave away the A-Rod steroid scandal, sneaking into a hospital to interview Joe Frazier... and the maddening therapy of Philly sports.
• Take the PTFO audience survey: https://forms.gle/i2K6FecAbvBqDxRK9
• Read "Perversion of Justice" by Julie K. Brown: https://www.harpercollins.com/products/perversion-of-justice-julie-k-brown?variant=44010796908578
Previously on PTFO:
• Part 1: Investigating Harvard's Hidden Epstein Files — WTF Is the Epstein Fund for Women's Sports? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1JclWYNwHQ
• Part 2: New Files Reveal How Epstein Paid Harvard to Launder His Image https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lmOHrXq2jpM
• We Showed a Basketball Icon His Name in the Epstein Files. Things Got Awkward. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Le4j0Goj1NI

“My boyfriend’s back and he’s better than ever…” Chris and Ahmed reunite to recap the Simms QB Countdown and answer some #AskMeAnything questions. Who would Chris rather have right now, Drake London or Nico Collins? But first, we welcome the newest member of the Unbuttoned family…Cameron Rogers! #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) We proudly present…Cameron Rogers!!! Who already has his dad’s style. (6:20) News: Nick Herbig gets big contract (11:10) Micah Parsons will miss the start of the season (17:25) Drake London gets 4-year extension (23:25) Rome Odunze’s eye-opening comments on his foot (25:10) Russell Wilson retires (32:25) QB Countdown: Which Draft Class quartet would Chris take for the future? (37:50) Homies react to Chris’ Top 10 (38:55) QB #7 Justin Herbert…is he given too many excuses? (42:05) QB #6 Caleb Williams…could he be #1 next year? (47:40) QB #5 Matthew Stafford…should he have been Top 4? (50:20) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes…do his accomplishments make him overrated or underrated? (53:10) QB #3 Lamar Jackson & #2 Joe Burrow…what separates them? (55:15) QB #1 Josh Allen…is he truly “unstoppable?” (1:03:35) #AskMeAnything: Myles Garrett MVP? Super Kicker? And when is Chris gonna drop another song?

entry.title: We Unearth Shocking New Harambe Video, 10 Years Later | PTFO
entry.summary:
Ten years ago, Harambe's death broke the internet, from sports and politics to million-dollar memes. But this viral gorilla's life was a tragic battle over name, image and likeness — including full videos that the Cincinnati Zoo worked to hide... until now. Desus Nice and Katie Nolan help Pablo Torre get to the bottom of what gorillas in our midst can teach us about ourselves.
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/
• Subscribe to "Casuals with Katie Nolan": https://www.youtube.com/katienolan
• Subscribe to "Desus Pieces" with Desus Nice: https://www.youtube.com/@DesusPieces

entry.title: How to Win at Jeopardy! (and at Life) with Mina Kimes | PTFO
entry.summary:
After winning "Celebrity Jeopardy!" All-Stars 2026, Mina Kimes shares her strategy of overpreparedness with Pablo Torre and Domonique Foxworth: How is studying for a game show like playing in the NFL? What's the first rule of "Jeopardy!" Fight Club? And why would you bet zero dollars with a million on the line? Plus: Katie Nolan's secret pep talk, Daily Double brain glitch, Spygate... and a buzzer bibliography.

Pablo Torre finds a kindred spirit... and Jessica Smetana makes history.

entry.title: How Billionaires Ate Fans Alive, with Mike Schur & Joe Posnanski | PTFO
entry.summary:
Have billionaire owners left us in the twilight of American fandom? Are crying Liverpool fans actually the cure for male loneliness? And is the NFL offseason running out of juice? Or would you get married during the Super Bowl on Valentine's Day? Plus: Jim Thome's farm adjacency, Regis Philbin analytics, Gerry and the Pacemakers, institutional investors, the worst pandemic crowd... and feeding a sandwich to Stugotz on Microsoft Teams.
• Read "Big Fan": https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/778607/big-fan-by-michael-schur-and-joe-posnanski-foreword-by-tom-hanks/

entry.title: Debunking Oz Pearlman's Tricks: Is He a Fraud? | PTFO
entry.summary:
He's wowed presidents, pro athletes and podcasters. But magicians tell us Oz Pearlman's viral act has crossed an ethical line. Stevie Baskin, after obsessively studying Pearlman's tricks, explains to Pablo Torre how influencers from Charles Barkley to the White House were in on the act — and why he thinks this brand of "mind-reading" amounts to fraud.
• Watch much more from Stevie Baskin: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FnwcU-XDyJ4
• Previously on PTFO: The Unwritten Rules of Magic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J-efPrAa7i8
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/

entry.title: Decoding the NFL vs. Rupert Murdoch (and TV Networks vs. Big Tech) | PTFO
entry.summary:
What do the tech titans of Silicon Valley and the old heads of traditional broadcast television have in common? Answer: they all need to kiss the ring of Roger Goodell. But will the NFL get too greedy in their continued pursuit of maximum return on their media rights? And why is Rupert Murdoch secretly meeting with Donald Trump? The Sporting Class — aka “Rich Guys OnlyFans” — returns…
Read Vanity Fair's "Roger Goodell's Hollywood Blitz: Why All the Other Moguls Have to Kiss the Ring" https://www.vanityfair.com/culture/story/roger-goodells-hollywood-blitz?srsltid=AfmBOorbSwEq_gn5FPDfzAy0jLtH6AviWhEdPSD6lGboChG4S5UhlT-g
Read Wall Street Journal's "Rupert Murdoch’s High-Stakes Blitz Against the NFL" https://www.wsj.com/business/media/murdoch-nfl-television-fight-35aa3587
Subscribe to "Nothing Personal with David Samson" https://www.youtube.com/@NPDS

entry.title: Unmasking Scottie Pippen's A.I. Crypto Slop: "Be Like Satoshi" | PTFO
entry.summary:
Why is the Bulls legend hawking "the Mona Lisa of sports" as a talking Web3 meme-coin NFT? And who are the secret weapons turning the 60-year-old Hall-of-Famer into a crypto bro, with a last-ditch effort to cash in on The Last Dance? Pablo Torre breaks out the folders for Jordan family friend Wyatt Cenac and former Pippen colleague Amin Elhassan, featuring revelations on MJ's son, Benihana, Lil Hippo... and so on.

entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) Jay (@croucherJD) and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) look back on the most outstanding moments over the last four years of the Fantasy Football Happy and are joined by a bevy of show contributors both in front and behind the scenes, including Pat Daugherty (@RotoPat), Denny Carter (@CDCarter13), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose). They also spend a little extra time in the discord with the Regulars answering questions and continuing long-standing show themes. #NFL #NBCSports #happyhour

entry.title: The Demise (and Future) of LIV Golf, Explained with Alan Shipnuck | PTFO
entry.summary:
Donald Trump may have ended his favorite sport's civil war — by waging war on Iran. But what did we really learn from Saudi Arabia's multibillion-dollar LIV Golf experiment? Journalist Alan Shipnuck explains what insiders are texting about but won't say out loud: that golfers are the most overpaid athletes on Earth, that peacetime is suddenly more complicated for the PGA Tour... and that sportswashing is insidious because it works.
• Read "LIV and Let Die" by Alan Shipnuck: https://www.simonandschuster.com/books/LIV-and-Let-Die/Alan-Shipnuck/9781668020012
• Previously on PTFO: Phil Mickelson, Trump and the "Big Daddy" Group-Chat Leak https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UbmBZR5aoRY
• Plus: Trump, Golf, and Saudi Arabia's Deal https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e0o4KKO-fdE

entry.title: Decrypting New MSG Surveillance Scoops & Whistleblower Power with ACLU's Ben Wizner | PTFO
entry.summary:
The Knicks are surging. But politicians are condemning owner James Dolan and his tax breaks, after our investigation with WIRED. So Pablo Torre tests the limits of facial recognition with his playoff ticket plug Ben Wizner, who just happens to be the Deputy Legal Director at the ACLU — and one of America's foremost experts on modern privacy. Which makes him uniquely (if begrudgingly) qualified to break down everything from spooked NBA journalists and a banned puppy, to Jeffrey Epstein and Harvey Weinstein connections… to, yes, the Mount Rushmore of whistleblowers.
• Previously on PTFO: Watching Fans, Monitoring Kids, Tracking Players — Knicks Surveillance, Revealed https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yNZ3hJPN5Vc
• From WIRED: "The Shocking Secrets of Madison Square Garden’s Surveillance Machine" https://www.wired.com/story/madison-square-garden-jim-dolan-surveillance-machine/
• PTFO Vault: Thunder GM Sam Presti's Jazz-Rap Album, Unearthed https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TGFpdy6upiU
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

entry.title: Reacting to Pablo's Real Pulitzer, the Fake JPMorgan Scandal & the Enhanced Games | PTFO
entry.summary:
Dropout’s Sam Reich and Michael Cruz Kayne join to help us answer: What does Mark Cuban think of Pablo Torre's big Pulitzer Prize win? Did A.I. write that JPMorgan threesome lawsuit? And are the steroid Olympics in fact the Apollo mission of RFK Jr.'s America? Plus: third-tier "Mad Men" characters, self-canonization, the polymath of punch-ups, the lifespan of an inbred beagle... and Zoop.
Further content:
• Pablo Torre left the worldwide leader in sports to start a podcast. It just won a Pulitzer. https://www.poynter.org/commentary/2026/pablo-torre-finds-out-pulitzer-prize-kawhi-leonard/
• Ex-JPMorgan banker Chirayu Rana files wild new claims against exec https://nypost.com/2026/05/04/business/ex-jpmorgan-banker-chirayu-rana-files-wild-new-claims-against-lorna-hajdini/
• Inside the Enhanced Games, Where Athletes Compete on Steroids. And Growth Hormones. And Adderall. https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/inside-the-enhanced-games
• Watch Michael Cruz Kayne's special, "Sorry for Your Loss" — now streaming on Dropout TV: https://watch.dropout.tv/videos/michael-cruz-kayne-sorry-for-your-loss

entry.title: 2026 Rookie Positional Rankings: Jeremiyah Love, Price, Tate | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) details his time at the Kentucky Derby which included a strange interaction at dinner to Jay (@croucherJD) and Connor (@ConnorJRogers), then the trio dive into where Matthew is placing rookies in his positional rankings this season. Jeremiyah Love, Jordyn Tyson, and Fernando Mendoza are among the players discussed. The crew also highlights A.J. Brown, Jaxson Dart and other veteran movers in the rankings along the way and wrap up the show with their favorite bets to win Super Bowl LXI. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) - Welcome (1:45) – Matthew recaps his time betting Churchill Downs and shares an unusual story going out to dinner (7:30) – Rookie RB Rankings: Jeremiyah Love (RB11), Jadarian Price (RB27) (18:45) – Rookie WR Rankings: Carnell Tate (WR25), Jordyn Tyson (WR32), Makai Lemon (WR44), KC Concepcion (WR46), Omar Cooper Jr. (WR55) + Germie Bernard, Antonio Williams intrigue (31:40) – Notable Veteran WR Movers: A.J. Brown (WR11), DeVonta Smith (WR14), Terry McLaurin (WR22) (37:20) – Jay reveals why he is feverishly rooting for Arsenal to win the Premier League (40:50) – Rookie QB Rankings: Fernando Mendoza (QB28) + Jaxson Dart (QB9), Tyler Shough (QB17) among top veteran movers (44:40) – Rookie TE Rankings: Kenyon Sadiq (TE20) + Mark Andrews (TE12), Dallas Goedert (TE13) headline veteran shifts (50:05) – Last Call: Way too early Super Bowl LXI Champion bets

entry.title: Sophomore Jumps + Shedeur vs Deshaun | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 869) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Chris is back from London…which celebrities did he meet in the swanky Arsenal suites? So will Travis Hunter play both ways again after all? Plus, Simms has some hard truths for the Shedeur Sanders fans, and he and Connor pick the 2nd-year players most likely to have a Sophomore Jump. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Chapters: (0:00) “I feel like I’m detoxing at a rate I’ve never experienced before” (5:10) Simms is back from London, and has a slideshow! (18:40) Connor has lost the mustache (28:55) Jaguars GM says Travis Hunter “is set to play both sides of the ball” (42:30) Deshaun Watson or Shedeur Sanders as Browns QB1? entry.title: Meet the Prosecutor Who Investigated Steve Ballmer's Clippers Nightmare | PTFO
entry.summary:
As the Clippers await punishment, owner Steve Ballmer is big mad at Pablo Torre — and appears worried about what Aspiration founder Joseph Sanberg might have told the NBA. So Pablo and David Samson (finally) sit down with a special guest: Lou Manzo, the former DOJ prosecutor who investigated this whole tree-planting fraud in the first place, to go inside the courtroom, comb through footnotes and focus on the end game.
(Additional reporting by Anita Bennett)
• Binge-watch Pablo Torre's Kawhi Leonard investigation: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLp43H6Vt_yDoUarxNb_fVK9_6bSiA2aHo
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

entry.title: Simms goes to London + 2026 Rookie Predictions | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 868) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Welcome from London! Chris is across the pond enjoying his time learning Arsenal chants & drinking outside pubs, while Connor is at home…trying to grow something on his face? The guys do some Rookie Predictions and try to find this year’s Tyler Shough, Tetairoa McMillan, and more. Then, they go through some NFL news on Patrick Mahomes & Fernando Mendoza, before critiquing Malik Wills’ viral first pitch at a Marlins game. Plus, we take an impromptu poll of which Simms impression is better: Patrick Mahomes or Bane? #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Chapters: (0:00) “What do you have growing on your face?” (7:10) Chris learned an Arsenal chant (14:05) RIP Yankees legend John Sterling (16:25) 2026 Rookie Predictions: This year’s Cam Ward? Raiders QB Fernando Mendoza (20:35) This year’s Tyler Shough? Cardinals QB Carson Beck (24:20) This year’s TreVeyon Henderson? Cardinals RB Jeremiyah Love & Seahawks RB Jadarian Price (27:25) This year’s Quinshon Judkins? Commanders RB Kaytron Allen & Broncos RB Jonah Coleman (30:00) This year’s Cam Skattebo? Chargers WR Brenen Thompson & Buccaneers DB Keionte Scott (32:45) This year’s Tetairoa McMillan? Titans WR Carnell Tate, Saints WR Jordyn Tyson, Commanders WR Antonio Williams (37:05) This year’s Luther Burden III? Panthers WR Chris Brazzell II & Dolphins WR Chris Bell (39:40) This year’s Grey Zabel? Texans OL Keylan Rutledge & Ravens OL Vega Ioane (41:00) This year’s James Pearce Jr? Jets DE David Bailey, LB Malachi Lawrence, 49ers DL Romello Height (44:00) This year’s Abdul Carter? Chiefs DE R Mason Thomas, Ravens DE Zion Young, Patriots LB Gabe Jacas (47:15) This year’s Carson Schwesinger? Titans LB Anthony Hill Jr, Commanders LB Sonny Styles, Vikings LB Jake Golday (50:30) This year’s Nick Emmanwori? Cowboys S Caleb Downs & Browns S Emmanuel McNeil-Warren (54:10) Andy Reid says QB Patrick Mahomes is in “good position” to participate in OTAs (58:05) Fernando Mendoza learning to play from under center (1:02:30) Texans agree to 3-year extension with LB Azeez Al-Shaair (1:03:45) Why did the Lions decline Jack Campbell’s 5th-year option? (1:07:45) Surprise poll! Which Simms impression is better: Bane or Patrick Mahomes? (1:11:15) Malik Willis goes viral…why are QBs bad at throwing a baseball?

entry.title: New Files Reveal How Epstein Paid Harvard to Launder His Image (Part 2) | PTFO
entry.summary:
Jeffrey Epstein wasn't just funding women's sports or creeping around campus. Our new files — and Harvard's own audit — show how a billionaire pedophile used the biggest brand in academia to launder his reputation. Pablo Torre and The Harvard Crimson's Dhruv Patel continue their investigation, with exclusive internal files, letters and interviews with athletes who say the university normalized a monster — and skirted accountability, until now.
• More from The Harvard Crimson: "Harvard Promised a 'Full' Review of Its Epstein Ties. Its Own Files Reveal What It Left Out." https://www.thecrimson.com/article/2026/5/1/epstein-harvard-hms-rating/

entry.title: Investigating Harvard's Hidden Epstein Files: WTF Is the Epstein Fund for Women's Sports? (Part 1)
entry.summary:
How did an unforgettable donation from the most notorious pedophile in America get past the most prestigious university's self-investigation? And why did Harvard allegedly ask to keep it confidential? In Part One of an exclusive collaboration, Pablo Torre and The Harvard Crimson's Dhruv Patel unearth internal financials, the secret role of president Lawrence Summers, plus new Jeffrey Epstein correspondence — and speak to the team that "never asked to be affiliated with this monster."

entry.title: Post NFL Draft Love/Hate live from Churchill Downs | Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:

Steve Kornacki (@SteveKornacki) also stops by to highlight favorites and long shot wagers he’s making not only for the Kentucky Derby, but also Friday’s Kentucky Oaks. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: "This Is the Smoking Gun": Digging Up NFL Collusion Dirt with Ex-Union Boss DeMaurice Smith | PTFO
entry.summary:
Secret salary caps. Accidental email attachments. Truth-serum texts from owners. Slide decks for ESPN. If anyone knows how to dork-out on billionaires taking your money — and documenting their greed — it's the former NFL Players Association boss who negotiated $100 billion for athletes... and sued the hell out of The Shield. With his union now plagued by scandal — and America as unregulated as ever — De Smith enters the studio in Gladiator Mode.
• Read "Turf Wars" by DeMaurice Smith: https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/735685/turf-wars-by-demaurice-smith/
Previously on PTFO:
• Part I: The Secret Texts and Testimony of NFL Owners and Superstar QBs, Revealed https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P42Wq3fmTYg
• Part II: We Got Another Secret Union Document — and Smoked Out Another Cover-Up https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SwVNM266nCM
• Part III: The FBI, the NFLPA, and the $10 Billion Money Trail https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OjOpA-N24Cc
• Part IV: The NFLPA Elected a New Leader — and Ignored an "Open Secret" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b-qLz63bhm8
• Part V: NFL Players' Union Top Cop Tells All https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ON-dN5xO7rg
• Part VI: Why an NFL 18-Game Regular Season Is Coming Sooner Than Players Think https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gaZdhv_pDug
• Part VII: What the NFLPA Scandal Means for Unions https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cNnAa9EWZxw

entry.title: Beijing Auto Show 2026: 8 GIANT SUVs. INSANE!
entry.summary:
At Beijing Auto Show 2026, over 1,400 cars were unveiled — but we're focusing on the 8 BIGGEST Chinese SUVs that are rewriting the rulebook. From a $22,000 budget giant to a $77,000 luxury flagship that makes Range Rover look like poverty spec, China is building some of the most impressive large SUVs on the planet.In this video, we walk you through the best massive SUVs from the Beijing Auto Show 2026 — covering design, tech, range, and price. Whether you're into off-road monsters, tech-loaded flagships, or incredible value, there's something here that will blow your mind.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
Wuling Xingguang L — 6-seater under $22,000 with 260km EV range Nio ES9 — $77,000 flagship with 42-point massage & battery swap in 3 minutes Freelander — British name, Chinese tech, 5.1 meters of modern muscle Hongqi 1927 — 4 motors, 1,850 Nm, three locking diffs & 0-100 in under 4 seconds VW Unix 08 — Built on XPENG's G9 platform with VLA 2.0 ADAS & 700km range XPENG GX — 5.3 meters, 3000 TOPS compute, 750km range — the tech king Leapmotor D19 — Longer than BMW X7, starts at $32,000 — the value king BYD Grand Tang — 780hp, megawatt flash charging, 0-97% in 8 minutes

entry.title: NIO ONVO L80 is Perfectly BORING with MASSIVE storage!
entry.summary:
The ONVO L80 is the latest EV from NIO's sub brand. The ONVO L80 is a 5-seat variant of the previously popular ONVO L90. In this video, we take a quick yet thorough look at the L80 and explore how ONVO has reworked the L90 into a large 5 seat version.
This video covers all the major details of the ONVO L80, from its stylish green colour and frunk features to the massive trunk space that easily rivals the NIO ET5 Touring. We also take a look at the upgraded ADAS system, now with roof-mounted LIDAR, making the ONVO L80 an even smarter vehicle than the first ONVO L90.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ____________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
Same dimensions as the L90 with a new green color Spacious 240-liter frunk & innovative camp kitchen Upgraded ADAS hardware, including roof-mounted LIDAR Impressive 17.3-inch rear entertainment screen 23-speaker sound system with 7.1.4 Dolby Atmos Efficient with 14.3kWh/100km for rear-wheel drive
____________________________________________________________ ⏱️ Video Chapters:

entry.title: Decoding the Dianna Russini & Mike Vrabel Story with David Samson | PTFO
entry.summary:
What are the business ethics of sh*tting where you eat? Can you be a journalist and an "insider" at the same time? And what happened after the Knicks' owner doxxed the man threatening his arena's beer? David Samson — the Marie Kondo of sports infidelity and the watchful eye of Florida baseball — helps Pablo decode the messy stories of Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel... and James Dolan versus his enemies.
• Watch "Nothing Personal with David Samson": https://www.youtube.com/@NPDS
• Previously on PTFO: Knicks Surveillance, Revealed https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yNZ3hJPN5Vc

entry.title: Breaking Down Celebrity Jeopardy! with Mina Kimes and Timothy Simons | PTFO
entry.summary:
We take "Celebrity Jeopardy! All-Stars" 2026 game tape very seriously: How does the game-show game clock move so fast? Why do you become 30% dumber when the cameras roll? And is Mina Kimes part of a sociopathic conspiracy with Ken Jennings? Plus: Andy Richter, button analytics, the dais height advantage, Daily Double anxiety, tanking board games for your kids... and a Stat Boy cameo.

• Watch "Nobody Wants This" with Timothy Simons on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81591296

entry.title: How The Onion Won the Infowars Sale — and Shut Up Alex Jones for Good
entry.summary:
The notorious conspiracy theorist profited from his vile Sandy Hook conspiracy. Then America's finest (fake) news source decided to troll the world's greatest troll. Ben Collins — who transformed from reporting on the historic Infowars defamation trial to buying out his "ideological enemy" in a Storage Wars-style auction saga — tells Pablo Torre why The Onion committed to the ultimate bit: doing the right thing.
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

entry.title: Watching Fans, Monitoring Kids, Tracking Players: Knicks Surveillance, Revealed | PTFO
entry.summary:
The all-seeing eye of notorious owner James Dolan has been caught in glimpses. But a WIRED investigation — revealed in collaboration with Pablo Torre Finds Out — lifts the veil on the Orwellian scope (and occasional clown show) of MSG security, from The Garden and The Sphere to the streets of New York and out across America. Correspondent Noah Shachtman and Pablo hear from spooked insiders, read snooping group chats, scour a second-by-second confidential report, plus view the facial-recognition database itself — only to discover that paranoid billionaires... are all around us.
• Read the full digital cover story at WIRED: https://www.wired.com/story/madison-square-garden-jim-dolan-surveillance-machine
• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/
(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)
entry.content:
The all-seeing eye of notorious owner James Dolan has been caught in glimpses. But a WIRED investigation — revealed in collaboration with Pablo Torre Finds Out — lifts the veil on the Orwellian scope (and occasional clown show) of MSG security, from The Garden and The Sphere to the streets of New York and out across America. Correspondent Noah Shachtman and Pablo hear from spooked insiders, read snooping group chats, scour a second-by-second confidential report, plus view the facial-recognition database itself — only to discover that paranoid billionaires... are all around us.

• Read the full digital cover story at WIRED: https://www.wired.com/story/madison-square-garden-jim-dolan-surveillance-machine

• Subscribe to Pablo's newsletter for exclusive access, documents and invites: https://www.pablo.show/

(Pablo Torre Finds Out is independently produced by Meadowlark Media and distributed by The Athletic. The views, research and reporting expressed in this episode are solely those of Pablo Torre Finds Out and do not reflect the work or editorial input of The Athletic or its journalists.)

entry.title: Dana White’s Politics, Saudi Money & Zuffa Boxing, Explained | PTFO
entry.summary:
Ulterior motives. Coercive deals. Saudi funding. In the era of American favor-trading, a company called TKO Group Holdings is dominating the fight game. (Welcome, Zuffa Boxing.) And as longtime MMA dean Luke Thomas dares to explain, UFC boss Dana White may be in denial — and it may not be good for fans or fighters — but it pays to be in bed with a transactional regime.
• Subscribe to "Morning Kombat" with Luke Thomas: https://www.youtube.com/c/MorningKombat
• Subscribe to Luke Thomas on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LukeThomas

entry.title: A Linebacker, a White Whale... and a Secret | PTFO
entry.summary: We get it: As Timothée Chalamet said, "no one cares" about opera. But you should listen, instead, to former college linebacker Brandon Jovanovich — whose impossible rise from cater waiter to Captain Ahab proves that the artform that used to rule the world has way more in common with sports than you realize. (And that's even before you realize what he's been playing through, onstage.) Also: what a castrato is, Bugs Bunny, actual divas, Modell's and monster trucks.
entry.content: We get it: As Timothée Chalamet said, "no one cares" about opera. But you should listen, instead, to former college linebacker Brandon Jovanovich — whose impossible rise from cater waiter to Captain Ahab proves that the artform that used to rule the world has way more in common with sports than you realize. (And that's even before you realize what he's been playing through, onstage.) Also: what a castrato is, Bugs Bunny, actual divas, Modell's and monster trucks.

entry.title: Ballmer's Salary-Cap Saga, Anthropic's Piracy Settlements and the (Selfish) Case for Rules | PTFO
entry.summary:
Whether it's A.I. companies pirating millions of books or NBA owners violating the salary cap, the most powerful entities in America are trying to circumvent laws created to restrain them. Bestselling author and investigative journalist David Epstein (no relation!) makes the case for why rules are not obstacles to progress, but the opposite: the very things that make a society — and a market — free.
• Pre-order David Epstein's new book, "Inside the Box: How Constraints Make Us Better": https://www.penguinrandomhouse.com/books/737494/inside-the-box-by-david-epstein/

entry.title: NIO ES9: Germany Has NO ANSWER To This Chinese SUV!
entry.summary:
The NIO ES9 is the SUV version of NIO's flagship ET9 sedan, combining high-tech luxury with the space and versatility of a large SUV. With its commanding road presence, 6 seat configuration, and a tech-forward interior, it might just be the answer to the growing demand for luxury EV SUVs. But how does it perform? Does it live up to the luxury SUV competition, or is it just another overhyped tech showcase?
In this video, we explore the NIO ES9’s design, features. Do you really need to spend top dollar for a luxury Rolls, Bentley or Aston to get the best of the best? I don't think so.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ______________________________________________________________
✅ Highlights:
- Stunning road presence - 600L trunk space - Brand new 47-speaker sound system with Dolby Atmos - Instant intelligent privacy glass - 42-point Spa Massage - 20-point foot massage! ______________________________________________________________

entry.title: Top 10 Rookie Superflex Rankings | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
After revealing Matthew’s whereabouts, Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) jump into Connor’s Rookie Superflex rankings for 2026, beginning with Jeremiyah Love, Jordyn Tyson, and Fernando Mendoza. The trio also discusses Omar Cooper Jr., Makai Lemon, Jadarian Price, and Kenyon Sadiq among others before highlighting Jauan Jenning and Stefon Diggs headlining the best remaining players in free agency. The show concludes with the crew’s favorite prop bets on positional totals drafted in the 1st Round later this month. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Welcome to the End of Civilization, with Katie Nolan and Michael Cruz Kayne
entry.summary:
Civilization had a pretty good run. Will the astronauts be the last ones living? Will Jordon Hudson sue Pablo Torre and/or beat him in a foot race? Could Sam Altman be bigger than Madoff and/or complete our curse on A.I.? And is your fiancé in the Epstein files? WHO KNOWS? But we f'd around and took your questions, live. So, come with us if you want to live. So mote it be.

entry.title: We Unraveled the Case of a Basketball Mob Hit | PTFO
entry.summary:
When the body of a Vegas power broker showed up in the back of a Rolls Royce in 1979, the new sports capital of America was born. Why the hell did superstar UNLV coach Jerry Tarkanian's guy Vic Weiss really get whacked? Correspondent Sean Carey unearths police reports, a thrown fight against Sugar Ray Leonard... and a bag man on the skim who re-legitimized Sin City — and proves HBO's hit show "Winning Time" wrong.
(Additional reporting by Kris Belman)

entry.title: Matthew Berry's Way Too Early QB and RB Rankings for 2026 | Fantasy Football Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers), and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) reveal a unique drink free candidate and react to Kirk Cousins reportedly joining the Raiders before diving into Matthew’s way too early QB and RB rankings for the upcoming season. Justin Herbert, Josh Allen, Lamar Jackson, and Caleb Williams headline the QB conversation, while Bijan Robinson, Christian McCaffrey, Saquon Barkley, and Chase Brown highlight the running backs. The show wraps up with the early best bets from the crew on 2026 Offensive Player of the Year. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL
Chapters: (0:00) -- Hello and welcome (1:10) – Matthew explains why UConn basketball drinks for free and finds another way to throw backup Producer Pete under the bus (7:20) – Rotoworld Player News: Kirk Cousins reportedly agrees to deal with Raiders (11:35) – QB Rankings: Malik Willis, Justin Herbert, Josh Allen, Lamar Jackson, Caleb Williams, Patrick Mahomes, Jaxson Dart, Matthew Stafford (31:25) – RB Rankings, Pt. 1: Bijan Robinson, Christian McCaffrey, Saquon Barkley, Chase Brown (47:30) – RB Rankins, Pt. 2: Quinshon Judkins, Kenneth Gainwell, James Conner (50:15) – Last Call: Best bets for 2026 Offensive Player of the Year » Subscribe to NBC Sports: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports?sub_confirmation=1 » Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl

entry.title: What the NFLPA Scandal Means for Unions — and the MLB Lockout | PTFO
entry.summary:
Domonique Foxworth ran — and lost — in the secretive election by the NFL Players' Association. As he explains to Pablo Torre and David Samson, unions may be more corporate than ever — but the fight against billionaires has never been more consequential. And the implications may turn nuclear for an MLB lockout.
• Watch "The Domonique Foxworth Show": https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLn3nHXu50t5wnTIdJOdFIA9wxAHHq2LEl
• Watch "Nothing Personal with David Samson": https://www.youtube.com/@NPDS

entry.title: Senator Chris Murphy CRACKS DOWN on Prediction Markets | PTFO
entry.summary:
Kalshi and Polymarket have created a Wild West for sports, war and politics in a shamelessly unregulated era. But the U.S. Senator from Connecticut (and Huskies homer) tells Pablo Torre that it's time to turn back the clock on insider trading, as leagues are "knowingly corrupting" the game. And that a return to the roots of rooting for our home teams (and families) requires Congress protecting against a profit-driven idea of America, especially in youth sports.
• Previously on PTFO: Prediction Markets, Explained — by the Accidental Creator of a Gambling Movement https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JzaH2f9OHy4
entry.content:

And that a return to the roots of rooting for our home teams (and families) requires Congress protecting against a profit-driven idea of America, especially in youth sports.

Tretter back to office — Pro Football Talk's Mike Florio says Roger Goodell and the bean-counters at the league office are ready to pounce on football every night of the week.

entry.title: Broncos trade for Jaylen Waddle + Connor’s Top 10 Prospect Positional Rankings | Happy Hour (FULL)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), Connor (@ConnorJRogers) and Lawrence (@LordDontLose) break down the Broncos trading for Jaylen Waddle and the Chiefs bringing in Justin Fields before highlighting free agency deals for Dallas Goedert, Rachaad White, Keaton Mitchell, and Christian Kirk. The group also dig into Connor’s 2026 draft prospect rankings, analyzing Fernando Mendoza, Jeremiyah Love, and Jordyn Tyson. Along the way they ponder how Matthew can find a better connection from his Florida home and predict who will select Jeremiyah Love.
Chapters: (0:00) - Welcome! (1:40) – Matthew explains his rooting interests in the NCAA Tournament (4:15) – Rotoworld Player News: Broncos trade for Jaylen Waddle, Chiefs acquire Justin Fields from Jets, Eagles bring back Dallas Goedert and bring in Hollywood Brown (19:10) – More News & Notes: Commanders add Rachaad White and Jerome Ford, Chargers sign Keaton Mitchell, Titans restructure Calvin Ridley’s deal, Giants sign Darnell Mooney, 49ers add Christian Kirk (28:30) – Connor’s Top 10 Rookie QBs and RBs: Fernando Mendoza, Jeremiyah Love, Jadarian Price (43:00) – Connor’s Top 10 Rookie WRs and TEs: Jordyn Tyson, Carnell Tate, Chris Bell, KC Conception, Kenyon Sadiq, Eli Stowers (49:15) – Last Call: Which team will draft Jeremiyah Love?

entry.title: Jones, Doubs headline more free agency deals + Murray to the Vikings? | Happy Hour (FULL SHOW)

Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR) explains a tumultuous final few moments before the show to Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers), then the trio dive into recent free agency deals, including Daniel Jones re-signing with the Colts, J.K. Dobbins and Aaron Jones return to the Broncos and Vikings respectively, Chig Okonkwo joining the Commanders, and more. The trio also ponder if Kyler Murray will sign with the Vikings before highlighting season-long yardage props for Mike Evans, Kenneth Walker III, and David Montgomery. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Free Agency Reaction: Kenneth Walker III, Travis Etienne, Mike Evans, Malik Willis | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
(0:00) – Welcome to Fantasy Football Happy Hour (1:50) – Most surprising move thus far in free agency (4:10) – Top Free Agency Moves: Kenneth Walker III lands with Chiefs, Travis Etienne agrees to deal with Saints, Mike Evans joins 49ers, Colts re-sign Alec Pierce, Michael Pittman Jr. traded to Steelers (28:40) – More Free Agency Reaction: Malik Willis agrees to deal with Dolphins, Tua Tagovailoa lands with Falcons, Wan’Dale Robinson links with Titans, Rashid Shaheed re-signs with Seahawks (44:00) – Other Notable RB Signings: Tyler Allgeier agrees to deal with Cardinals, Rico Dowdle links with Steelers, Kenneth Gainwell joins Bucs (52:25) – TE Free Agency Reaction: Travis Kelce returns to Chiefs, Isaiah Likely reportedly agrees to 3-year deal with Giants
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) whip through the early free agency moves around the league, discussing Kenneth Walker to the Chiefs, Mike Evans to the 49ers, Alec Pierce re-signing with the Colts, Malik Willis to the Dolphins, and Tua Tagovailoa landing with the Falcons. Along the way they also highlight Travis Etienne, Michael Pittman Jr., Wan’Dale Robinson, Tyler Allgeier, and Isaiah Likely changing teams. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Li Auto i6: Controversial Looks Can't Hide Its GENIUS!
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
I look at tthe Li Auto i6, an EV that’s packed with premium features like a massive interior, top-tier ADAS, and super-fast charging. The Li Auto i6 offers impressive performance with its dual-motor AWD system and an interior that feels truly high-end. But here’s the kicker: the Li Auto i6’s styling is definitely controversial. Will buyers be able to look past the i6's awkward exterior and focus on everything else it has to offer? Let’s dive in and find out if the Li Auto i6 is a game-changing EV despite its looks.

entry.title: Most Interesting Things Heard at the Combine + Biggest Winners from Indy | Happy Hour (FULL SHOW)
entry.summary:
Matthew (@MatthewBerryTMR), Jay (@croucherJD), and Connor (@ConnorJRogers) recap an eventful NFL Combine starting with some of the most interesting things Berry heard in Indianapolis, including updates on Mike Evans, Deebo Samuel and Malik Willis. The guys also go through the biggest news this week, with the latest on Kyler Murray, DJ Moore and Stefon Diggs. The groups wrap with Connor’s biggest winners from the Combine, and their best bets on Kyler Murray’s next team. #NBCSports #FantasyFootballHappyHour #NFL

entry.title: Zeekr 7X Family Road Trip: NOTHING Went As Planned!
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
Join me as I take the Zeekr 7X on an epic 800 km road trip through the heart of China! This Swedish-designed, China-driven electric SUV is ready for the long haul, but can it survive three days and 12 hours in the car with my family? Spoiler alert: It’s more than up to the task.
With the Zeekr 7X, expect a mix of stunning views, unexpected adventures, and some seriously smooth road trip vibes. From winding mountain roads to the vibrant streets of Chenzhou, I’ll show you what this EV can do while keeping my family entertained and comfortable.
But is the Zeekr 7X truly the perfect road trip companion or just another overhyped electric SUV? Let’s dive into the experience and find out!
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
✅ Highlights:
• Sleek Swedish design, packed with tech and luxury • fast-charging capabilities • Dual-motor all-wheel drive, smooth power delivery • Family-friendly with spacious seating and entertainment • Impressive NVH (noise, vibration, harshness) control for quiet driving • A mix of scenic drives, local eats, and cultural experiences • Real-world charging experience in remote areas

entry.title: Zeekr 9X UNLEASHES 1400HP Beast That DESTROYS Luxury SUVs
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me via Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
I finally got behind the wheel of the all-new Zeekr 9X — the biggest, boldest, most luxurious Zeekr yet.
With its massive chrome grille, brutalist styling, and tri-motor, 1,030 kW Hyper Edition, some have called it the “Chinese Cullinan.” But the 9X isn’t a copy — it’s Zeekr’s own flagship statement, packed with tech, performance, and a luxury interior that rivals anything Europe has on offer.
But is the Zeekr 9X really worth its 480k–570k RMB price tag? Is it a true luxury SUV benchmark or just a spec-sheet flex? Let’s find out.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇
✅ Highlights:
• 900V SEA Super Hybrid Platform with 6C charging (20–80% in 9 mins) • Up to 1,030 kW power, 0–100 km/h in 3.1 seconds • Tri-motor Hyper Edition + dual-motor Max/Ultra trims • Dual-chamber air suspension & 48V active roll stabilization • 32-speaker, 3,868 W Naim Audio 9.2.4.8 Dolby Atmos system • Sliding 17-inch OLED rear entertainment screen • Swiveling zero-gravity second-row seats with 22-point massage • 3-row cabin with real wood, metal accents, and nappa leather • Active road & engine noise cancellation, NVH near EV levels • Zeekr G-Pilot ADAS, Level 3–ready on Hyper spec

I finally got behind the wheel of the brand-new NIO ES8. The third generation of NIO’s flagship SUV.
The original ES8 was NIO’s statement piece, but it came at a steep price. Now, NIO has dropped the cost massively, packed in more tech, more features, and more luxury, and is gunning straight for the world’s premium SUV market. Range Rover, GLS, X7… consider yourselves on notice.
But is the new ES8 just cheaper, or has NIO actually built a flagship that can reset what we expect from a luxury SUV? Let’s find out.

Massive price drop vs. the outgoing ES8
Battery-as-a-Service (BaaS) option slashing costs further
900V architecture with 600 kW peak charging

Tech-heavy cabin with new screen setup ___________________________________________________________________________________________

entry.title: China’s EV Makers Make a SHOCKING U-Turn – Here’s Why
entry.summary:
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Contact me vis Whatsapp +86 18570089464 We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
Interested in importing a Chinese EV or Hybrid? Email us at ChinaDriven123@gmail.com We can connect you with our experienced Car Export partner.
Big boy SUVs are everywhere at the Chengdu Auto Show 2025. Over five meters long, three rows, flagship status — it seems every Chinese brand is rolling out a massive NEV SUV this year. But why so many new hybrids, and not pure EVs?
This show may not be as flashy as Beijing or Shanghai, but Chengdu gives us the perfect chance to step back and look at the trend. From Geely’s Galaxy M9 to Yangwang, Zeekr, and others, Chinese OEMs are clearly betting that hybrids are the safe play in the market.
So what does this mean for the EV transition in China? Are things slowing down for pure EVs?

I finally got behind the wheel of the stunning XPeng P7, the original Xpeng P7 car kickstarted my obsession with Chinese EVs. The original P7 Performance was a sleek, rebellious sports sedan in a sea of sensible crossovers… but after a softer Xpeng P7+ follow-up, many wondered: was the magic gone?
Well, this new P7 Performance is sharper, faster, smarter and possibly even better looking. But does it still have that original spark? Or is it just another facelift with a fancy spoiler?
Let’s find out.

Active aero + adaptive suspension
New interior with swiveling 15.6” screen & 87" AR HUD
Up to 820 km range (CLTC) with fast 5C charging
Three Turing AI chips + Snapdragon 8295 for cockpit & ADAS

🚗 I’m back in the ONVO L90 — this time to drive it.
After a full walkaround in my previous video, we’re now taking this premium, three-row electric SUV for a spin in the mountains of Chongli, Hebei. entry.title: This Geely EM-I Hybrid gets INSANE Fuel Economy!
entry.summary:
2.6L/100km | 100mpg - Real-world test in CRAZY Chinese MEGA-City Chongqing!
I finally got behind the wheel of the Geely A7 EM-i, one of Geely's hybrid cars powered by the brand-new E-motive Intelligent Super Hybrid system — their answer to BYD’s DM-i.
Geely claims this next-gen system delivers super low fuel consumption, smarter energy management, and stronger performance. But is it just another hybrid… or the smartest PHEV on the market right now?
In this video, I take the EM-i system on a proper real-world test at 30% SoC through Chongqing’s traffic, city roads, and highways to see what it’s really capable of. How efficient is it when the battery runs low?
Spoiler: it surprised me.
Highlights and Video Chapters below 👇 ___________________________________________________________________________________________ ✅ Highlights:
Geely’s latest EM-i Super Hybrid system explained
Try to beat the claimed 2.67L/100km fuel economy
Real-world efficiency tested on city + highway routes
Smooth EV mode driving, seamless engine transitions

entry.title: Li Mega: The ULTIMATE EV Charge Speed!
entry.summary:
#LiMega #LiAutoMega #LiAuto
The Li Auto MEGA/Li Mega is the first BEV from Li Auto. It also boasts the fastest charging speeds of any EV in the world. The Li Mega is a premium MPV targeted at families. Can the Li Mega follow Li Auto’s sales success with its L-Series EREVs? Are people ready to spend this much on a family mover?
The Li Mega has a lot to offer, high charging speeds, sci-fi looks and massive amounts of interior space.

entry.title: Xpeng's Self Driving - Let's try it and chat
entry.summary:
#Xpeng #XNGP #xpengg9
We had a chat with Anthony from @Pandaway about Xpeng XNGP City while using Xpeng XNGP City. I drove XNGP City back when the Xpeng G6 launched, but two months on improvements have been made. So we hopped into the new Xpeng G9 to have another go.
We described XNGP last time as a bit of a nervous learner driver in it’s driving habits. Has it got better? Short answer…YES! But have a listen as we talk through our thoughts about XNGP City and XNGP Highway while we experience it again.
entry.content:
#Xpeng #XNGP #xpengg9

We had a chat with Anthony from @Pandaway about Xpeng XNGP City while using Xpeng XNGP City. I drove XNGP City back when the Xpeng G6 launched, but two months on improvements have been made. So we hopped into the new Xpeng G9 to have another go.

We described XNGP last time as a bit of a nervous learner driver in it’s driving habits. Has it got better? Short answer…YES! But have a listen as we talk through our thoughts about XNGP City and XNGP Highway while we experience it again.
